title: Callback times out symptom (Webhooks)
summary: Resolve "callback times out" — symptom for the Webhooks surface.

content.text:
## Symptom

An operation against the Webhooks surface fails with an error matching "callback times out (symptom)".

## Resolution

1. Inspect the error envelope.
2. Re-issue with corrected parameters.
3. Confirm via the audit log.

See the [Webhooks API reference](/docs/api/buckets/get) for the exact field set.
